shortDescription: The social platform for the global Muslim Ummah
longDescription:
Mizanly (ميزانلي) is the first culturally intelligent social platform built for the global Muslim community. Five integrated spaces bring together everything you need in one app:

🕌 SAF (الصف) — Share photos, stories, and moments with your community. Like Instagram, but designed with Islamic values at its core.

💬 MAJLIS (المجلس) — Join meaningful discussions, share your thoughts, and engage with threads. A space for dialogue and knowledge sharing.

✉️ RISALAH (رسالة) — Private encrypted messaging, group chats, and voice notes. Stay connected with family, friends, and your community.

🎬 BAKRA (بكرة) — Short-form videos with an Islamic-first algorithm. Discover inspiring content from creators around the world.

📺 MINBAR (المنبر) — Long-form Islamic education, lectures, and content. Learn from scholars and educators.

🌙 ISLAMIC FEATURES:
• Prayer times with customizable notifications
• Quran audio with multiple reciters
• 99 Names of Allah with daily learning
• Comprehensive Dua collection
• Fasting tracker for Ramadan and Sunnah fasts
• Dhikr counter with challenges
• Quran memorization (Hifz) tracker
• Halal restaurant finder
• Mosque community pages
• Islamic calendar theming
• Scholar Q&A sessions

🔒 PRIVACY & SAFETY:
• End-to-end encrypted messaging
• Content moderation powered by AI
• Parental controls
• No inappropriate ads or content

🌍 AVAILABLE IN 8 LANGUAGES:
English, Arabic (العربية), Turkish (Türkçe), Urdu (اردو), Bengali (বাংলা), French (Français), Indonesian (Bahasa Indonesia), Malay (Bahasa Melayu)

Join millions of Muslims worldwide on Mizanly — where faith meets community.
